first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. Both award the same score (4/10) for the same core reason: the candidate is a strong senior individual contributor but lacks the formal people management experience required for the role. All strengths and concerns are preserved across both versions, with only minor, inconsequential differences in wording. A small discrepancy in the calculated years of experience (18+ vs 15+) is within the bounds of normal model noise and does not affect the final assessment.
